zh.Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Waldegrave I於1303年9月26日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Walter Waldegrave32歲，母親Elizabeth de Neville12歲。他於大約1334年與Agnes d'Aubeney在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1338年4月10日在他的家鄉享年34歲。

zh-hans.Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Waldegrave I于1303年9月26日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Walter Waldegrave32岁，母亲Elizabeth de Neville12岁。他于大约1334年与Agnes d'Aubeney在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1338年4月10日在他的家乡享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Waldegrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Walgrave (Northants), which is recorded as Waldgrave in 1086.

variants.name: Woolgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a late variant of   Waldegrave  .

variants.name: Allgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a variant of   Waldegrave  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Waldegrave I was born on 26 September 1303, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, Walter Waldegrave, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth de Neville, was 12. He married Agnes d'Aubeney about 1334, in Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 10 April 1338, in his hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Waldegrave I est né le 26 septembre 1303, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Waldegrave, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Neville, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Agnes d'Aubeney environ 1334, à Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1338, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Waldegrave I am 26. September 1303 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Waldegrave 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Neville 12. Er hat um 1334 in Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes d'Aubeney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 10. April 1338 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Waldegrave I è nato il il 26 settembre 1303 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Walter Waldegrave, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Neville, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Agnes d'Aubeney circa 1334, nel Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 10 aprile 1338, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイア
ja.Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワルグラブ
ja.Waldegrave, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Waldegrave Iが1303年9月26日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Walter Waldegraveは32歳，母Elizabeth de Nevilleは12歳であった。約1334年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワルグラブでAgnes d'Aubeneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1338年4月10日に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Waldegrave I(이)가 1303년 9월 26일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Waldegrave(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Neville(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 월그레이브에서 Agnes d'Aubeney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1338년 4월 10일 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.26 September 1303–10 April 1338: 1303 оны Есдүгээр сарын 26–1338 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 10

pt.26 September 1303–10 April 1338: 26 de setembro de 1303–10 de abril de 1338
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Waldegrave I nasceu em 26 de setembro de 1303, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Waldegrave, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Neville, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes d'Aubeney aproximadamente 1334, em Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1338, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Waldegrave I родился 26 сентября 1303 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Waldegrave было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Neville, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes d'Aubeney около 1334 г. в местности валграв, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 10 апреля 1338 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.

es.26 September 1303–10 April 1338: 26 de septiembre de 1303–10 de abril de 1338
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Waldegrave I nació el 26 de septiembre de 1303, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Waldegrave, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Neville, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Agnes d'Aubeney aproximadamente 1334, en Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 10 de abril de 1338, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años.
